The ED complaint alleges the organization bypassed financial regulations using over 1,000 foreign debit cards, with funds routed to Left Wing Extremism-affected areas.

Avoid hair and nail cutting, applying oil, and consuming tamasic food.

NFL insiders believe San Francisco wants to strengthen its pass rush after struggling defensively last season. Other names, including Arizona Cardinals pass rusher Josh Sweat, have also surfaced in trade discussions.

The Maharashtra Cyber Police registered an FIR against Pranit More, Himanshu Jangra and Sejal Pawar. Both Jangra and Pawar faced serious consequences, with Jangra losing his job and Pawar being put on compulsory leave.

Microsoft president Brad Smith has a message for students booing tech CEOs
description: Microsoft president Brad Smith has responded to graduating students who booed AI at commencement ceremonies this spring, calling the backlash a "powerful wake-up call for the tech sector." In a 3,000-word essay, Smith acknowledged the class of 2026 faces a "perfect storm" of AI automation and tech layoffs, yet urged graduates to adapt rather than fear AI. His optimistic message arrives as Sam Altman, Mustafa Suleyman, and Dario Amodei clash over AI's job impact.

title: 'No disaster awaiting India': Sitharaman dismisses Rahul's 'economic tsunami' warnings
description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman strongly defended the Modi government's achievements, countering Rahul Gandhi's criticisms. She highlighted India's robust economic growth amidst global challenges, citing IMF acknowledgments and significant poverty reduction. Sitharaman also detailed the government's welfare initiatives and infrastructure investments, particularly in Karnataka, urging collective effort towards a developed India by 2047.

The couple shared the joyous news on Instagram, expressing their love and gratitude. This follows Surbhi's pregnancy announcement in February and her wedding to businessman Sumit Suri in October 2024.

description: Teen batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has thrown his support behind the Indian Women's T20 World Cup team ahead of their crucial match against Pakistan. The 15-year-old, who had a stellar IPL 2026, shared a heartfelt message on Instagram, boosting team morale. India, with a strong historical record against Pakistan, aims for a winning start in Birmingham.

title: 'Governor' box office collection Day 3 [LIVE]: Eyes Rs 3 crore opening weekend on first Sunday
description: Chinmay D. Mandlekar's 'Governor', starring Manoj Bajpayee as a fictionalised RBI Governor navigating the 1990 Indian economic crisis, is closing out its opening weekend with a cumulative domestic net of Rs 2.42 crore. After a Day 1 net of Rs 0.90 crore across 1,427 shows and a promising 27.8% jump to Rs 1.15 crore on Day 2. Produced by Vipul Amrutlal Shah under Sunshine Pictures and featuring music by Amit Trivedi with lyrics by Javed Akhtar, the UA 13+ certified financial thriller has arrived to critical interest but faces the familiar challenge of converting niche subject matter into mainstream footfall. Final Day 3 figures are still to be consolidated.

title: Quote of the day by Morgan Freeman
description: Renowned actor Morgan Freeman recently delivered a thought-provoking message about the importance of living in the now, drawing inspiration from contemporaries like Jim Carrey. He highlighted the significance of finding peace in stillness, encouraging individuals to allow life to flow organically instead of relentlessly seeking to dominate every situation.

title: 'Won't take body until encounter': Tension grips Dehradun after communal clash; what we know
description: Uttarakhand Chief Minister Pushkar Singh Dhami vowed "strictest possible action" against lawbreakers following a fatal clash in Dehradun. The violence, reportedly over a water dispute, left one dead and three injured. Dhami assured no one would escape justice, as police investigate and have begun demolishing an accused's property.

Recovered by police after eloping, she was reunited with her family at Badausa station. During counseling, her father reportedly attacked her with a sharp weapon. Police allege her boyfriend, a hotel waiter from Darjeeling, killed her with a kitchen knife after suspecting her fidelity. The couple had recently moved to the city for work.

Meta's highest paid employee Alexandr Wang 'admits' the company's previous AI policy didn't work
description: Meta's Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang has admitted that the company's open-source AI playbook no longer fits its frontier models, with Muse Spark kept proprietary after early training flagged bio risk and other safety concerns. Wang says rival AI labs are seeing the same risks scale up. Meanwhile, Meta is testing subscriptions on Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp and its AI chatbot to diversify beyond ads.

description: Bharuch police and administration have heightened security due to ASI concerns over a planned gathering of 5,000 people on June 15. Canada's sixth-largest state Manitoba retires student pathway to permanent residency
description: Manitoba has closed its Career Employment Pathway for international graduates, effective immediately. Candidates with active EOIs and six months of provincial work experience can now be considered under the Skilled Worker in Manitoba Pathway. This change aims to align graduates' skills with labor market needs, prioritizing those who studied and are working in the province.
